Tolga Polat

Marketing leader who builds the systems behind growth - forecasting models, automation pipelines, reporting infrastructure. Currently heading digital marketing for a 12-person team.

Istanbul, Turkey

About

8+ years across performance marketing, growth strategy, and marketing operations. I've worked in B2C e-commerce, B2B distribution, own-brand product marketing, retail, and SaaS - always at the intersection of data, automation, and revenue.

My background isn't just running campaigns. I build forecasting models that predict weekly revenue at 85% accuracy, design reporting pipelines from GA4 to Looker Studio, and wire up automation workflows with N8N and APIs. The kind of marketing infrastructure that compounds.

Growth Strategy Performance Marketing Marketing Ops Data Analytics Forecasting Team Leadership Google Ads GA4 SEO CRO Automation AI/LLM Tools Looker Studio N8N

Head of Digital Marketing
2023 — Present
incehesap.com - Consumer electronics, B2C + B2B

Managing a 12-person team across SEM, SEO, CRM, influencer, and content. Built forecasting systems, nearly doubled ROAS, led go-to-market for a native mobile app. Also handling brand marketing for an in-house gaming peripherals brand and B2B distributor marketing across the group.

incehesap.com

Led a content team of 4. Built SEO-driven content programs that drove significant organic traffic and engagement growth.
